openmeter/productcatalog/addon/adapter.purpose: Ent/PostgreSQL adapter implementing addon.Repository — full CRUD and list for add-ons and their rate cards, every operation wrapped in entutils.TransactingRepo to honor ctx-bound transactions. The persistence boundary for the addon domain.

patterns.name: TransactingRepo on every method
patterns.description: Every exported method wraps its fn body in entutils.TransactingRepo[T, *adapter](ctx, a, fn). Never access a.db directly outside the wrapper.

patterns.name: Tx/WithTx/Self triad
patterns.description: adapter implements TxCreator (Tx via HijackTx+NewTxDriver), TxUser (WithTx via NewTxClientFromRawConfig().Client()), and Self() — all required by TransactingRepo.
patterns.example: func (a *adapter) WithTx(ctx context.Context, tx *entutils.TxDriver) *adapter { return &adapter{db: entdb.NewTxClientFromRawConfig(ctx, *tx.GetConfig()).Client(), logger: a.logger} }

patterns.name: Eager-load rate cards
patterns.description: Every query returning an Addon calls WithRatecards(AddonEagerLoadRateCardsFn); PlanAddons loaded only when Expand.PlanAddons via WithPlans(addonEagerLoadActivePlans).

patterns.name: Soft delete via DeletedAt
patterns.description: DeleteAddon sets DeletedAt=time.Now().UTC() via UpdateOneID; ListAddons excludes deleted rows with addondb.DeletedAtIsNil() unless IncludeDeleted is set.

patterns.name: Status filtering via Effective time predicates
patterns.description: AddonStatus is derived at query time from EffectiveFrom/EffectiveTo predicates (active/draft/archived). Never compute status in Go after fetching all rows.

patterns.name: Rate card updates replace all (delete + bulk-create)
patterns.description: UpdateAddon deletes all existing AddonRateCard rows then rateCardBulkCreate — full replacement, no diff logic.

patterns.name: All conversions in mapping.go
patterns.description: CRUD methods call FromAddonRow / FromAddonRateCardRow / FromPlanAddonRow / asAddonRateCardRow. Never embed conversion in query methods.

key_file_guides.role: Config struct, New constructor with Validate(), adapter struct, and Tx/WithTx/Self plumbing.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Never remove Tx/WithTx/Self — required by TransactingRepo. Always call config.Validate() before constructing.

key_file_guides.role: All CRUD+list methods plus rateCardBulkCreate and addonEagerLoadActivePlans.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Wrap every method body with TransactingRepo. GetAddon uses an SQL subquery for latest-version-by-key — prefer existing addondb predicates over raw selectors.

key_file_guides.role: Bidirectional Ent<->domain mapping; reuses plan adapter mappers (FromPlanRow, FromPlanPhaseRow, FromPlanRateCardRow).
key_file_guides.watch_for: Call TaxConfig.BackfillTaxConfig after mapping the TaxCode edge. BillingCadence uses ParsePtrOrNil()/ISOString, never raw string assignment.

key_file_guides.role: Integration tests against real Postgres via pctestutils.NewTestEnv covering CRUD plus status-filter logic.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Prefer t.Context() over context.WithCancel for new tests; TestEnv closed in t.Cleanup.

anti_patterns: Calling a.db.Foo() directly inside a method without TransactingRepo — bypasses ctx-bound transactions.
Embedding type-conversion logic in CRUD methods instead of mapping.go.
Querying add-ons without WithRatecards eager load.
Hard-deleting rows instead of setting DeletedAt.
Building raw SQL predicates for status filtering instead of EffectiveFrom/EffectiveTo Ent predicates.

decisions.decision: TransactingRepo wraps every method rather than passing *entdb.Tx explicitly.
decisions.rationale: Ent transactions propagate via ctx; explicit tx params leak plumbing and prevent safe savepoint nesting.

decisions.decision: Rate card updates fully replace (delete + bulk-create) rather than diffing.
decisions.rationale: No partial state after update; ordering and key uniqueness enforced atomically without diff complexity.

code_examples.scenario: Add an adapter method for an addon sub-resource

openmeter/productcatalog/addon/httpdrive.purpose: HTTP handler layer for the addon domain, adapting addon.Service to request/response via the generic httptransport.Handler pipeline. Exposes a Handler interface consumed by the v1 Chi router; each operation is an independently typed handler value.

patterns.name: httptransport.NewHandler(WithArgs) per operation
patterns.description: Each operation returns a typed handler via NewHandler (no path params) or NewHandlerWithArgs (with path params): decoder, operation, encoder closures.

patterns.name: Type aliases per operation
patterns.description: Each handler block declares Request/Response/Handler type aliases mapping domain input/output to api.* generated types.
patterns.example: type ( ListAddonsRequest = addon.ListAddonsInput; ListAddonsResponse = api.AddonPaginatedResponse; ListAddonsHandler httptransport.HandlerWithArgs[ListAddonsRequest, ListAddonsResponse, ListAddonsParams] )

patterns.name: Namespace via h.resolveNamespace(ctx)
patterns.description: Every decoder calls h.resolveNamespace(ctx) (namespacedriver.NamespaceDecoder). Namespace comes from context, never a path param.
patterns.example: ns, err := h.resolveNamespace(ctx); if err != nil { return ..., err }

patterns.name: ValidationErrorEncoder per handler
patterns.description: Every handler appends WithErrorEncoder(productcataloghttp.ValidationErrorEncoder(ResourceKindAddon)) to map validation errors to 400.

patterns.name: All api<->domain conversions in mapping.go
patterns.description: FromAddon, AsCreateAddonRequest, AsUpdateAddonRequest live in mapping.go; closures call them, never inline-convert.

patterns.name: Handler interface with compile-time assertion
patterns.description: Handler embeds AddonHandler listing all operation methods; var _ Handler = (*handler)(nil) asserts compliance.

key_file_guides.role: Handler + AddonHandler interface definitions, handler struct, New constructor, resolveNamespace helper.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New operations must be added to both the AddonHandler interface and the handler struct; never bypass resolveNamespace.

key_file_guides.role: One function per HTTP operation, each returning its typed handler.
key_file_guides.watch_for: IgnoreNonCriticalIssues=true on create/update — preserve. Delete uses StatusNoContent + EmptyResponseEncoder; Create uses StatusCreated.

key_file_guides.role: api<->domain conversion using productcatalog/http rate-card helpers.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Call Currency.Validate() after assignment. Use http.AsRateCards/http.FromRateCard, not custom rate-card logic.

anti_patterns: Calling domain services inside decoder functions — decoders only parse/validate HTTP input.
Inline type conversion in handler closures instead of mapping.go.
Omitting WithErrorEncoder(ValidationErrorEncoder(...)) — validation errors won't map to 400.
Adding handler methods to the struct without adding them to the Handler/AddonHandler interface.
Using context.Background() inside closures instead of the passed ctx.

decisions.decision: Handlers return typed handler values rather than implementing http.Handler directly.
decisions.rationale: The httptransport.Handler[Req,Resp] pattern separates decode/operation/encode, making each independently testable and middleware-composable via Chain.

code_examples.scenario: Add an addon HTTP operation with a path param

openmeter/productcatalog/addon/service.purpose: Business logic layer implementing addon.Service — versioned add-on lifecycle (create/update/delete/publish/archive), feature and tax-code resolution for rate cards before persistence, and Watermill domain-event publishing inside each transaction.

patterns.name: transaction.Run for all mutations
patterns.description: Create, Delete, Publish, Archive, UpdateAddon wrap their fn in transaction.Run(ctx, s.adapter, fn) for atomicity across adapter calls and event publishing.

patterns.name: resolveFeatures before persisting rate cards
patterns.description: Create/Update call s.resolveFeatures to bi-directionally populate FeatureKey/FeatureID; GenericNotFoundError is converted to GenericValidationError.
patterns.example: if err = s.resolveFeatures(ctx, params.Namespace, &params.RateCards); err != nil { if models.IsGenericNotFoundError(err) { err = models.NewGenericValidationError(err) } }

patterns.name: resolveTaxCodes after resolveFeatures
patterns.description: s.resolveTaxCodes populates TaxConfig.TaxCodeID via productcatalog.ResolveTaxConfig (taxCode.GetOrCreateByAppMapping) for each rate card with a Stripe code.
patterns.example: if err = s.resolveTaxCodes(ctx, params.Namespace, &params.RateCards); err != nil { return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to resolve tax codes: %w", err) }

patterns.name: addonVersions for version management
patterns.description: getAddonVersions fetches all versions incl. deleted; HasDraft() guards concurrent drafts; Latest() drives auto-increment of params.Version.

patterns.name: Event publish inside the transaction fn
patterns.description: Each mutating op publishes a typed event (NewAddonCreateEvent, etc.) via s.publisher.Publish inside the tx fn; publish failure rolls back the DB write.
patterns.example: event := addon.NewAddonCreateEvent(ctx, aa); if err = s.publisher.Publish(ctx, event); err != nil { return nil, err }

patterns.name: Config validation in New
patterns.description: service.New validates all five deps (Adapter, Feature, TaxCode, Logger, Publisher); var _ addon.Service = (*service)(nil) asserts compliance.
patterns.example: if config.Adapter == nil { return nil, errors.New("add-on adapter is required") }

key_file_guides.role: Config struct, New constructor with mandatory dependency validation, service struct.
key_file_guides.watch_for: All five dependencies are required — never make them optional without explicit noop fallbacks.

key_file_guides.role: All addon.Service methods plus resolveFeatures, resolveTaxCodes, addonVersions, getAddonVersions.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Only draft add-ons can be updated (ValidateAddonWithStatus). Delete requires Plans loaded (Expand.PlanAddons=true) before checking active assignments.

key_file_guides.role: Integration tests covering create->publish->v2->archive via pctestutils.NewTestEnv.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Verify single-draft enforcement (HasDraft) and version auto-increment.

key_file_guides.role: Tests for tax-code dual-write (TaxConfig.TaxCodeID) via assertAddonRCDBCols querying the DB directly.
key_file_guides.watch_for: assertAddonRCDBCols checks tax_code_id and tax_behavior columns at DB level — reuse for future tax-persistence tests.

anti_patterns: Calling s.adapter methods directly without transaction.Run for multi-write or event-publishing ops.
Skipping resolveFeatures/resolveTaxCodes when accepting rate cards.
Allowing multiple non-deleted draft versions for the same key — check HasDraft() first.
Publishing domain events outside the transaction fn.
Using context.Background() instead of the passed ctx.

decisions.decision: Version auto-increment computed from addonVersions.Latest() rather than a DB sequence.
decisions.rationale: Enables draft-on-active branching with explicit version semantics in the domain model, decoupled from DB identity generation.

decisions.decision: Tax code resolution (GetOrCreateByAppMapping) happens at the service layer, not the adapter.
decisions.rationale: Tax-code creation is a cross-domain side effect requiring taxcode.Service; the adapter stays focused on persisting what it receives.

code_examples.scenario: Add a mutating addon service operation
